description_long: This is a modern L-shaped desk featuring a striking geometric design with alternating black and natural wood stripes on the top surface. The left support is a solid block adorned with a bold black-and-white triangular pattern, while the right side is supported by two metallic cylindrical legs. The inner corner of the desk has a curved cutout, providing ergonomic access for the user. The left side panel also displays vertical slats, adding a textural contrast to the otherwise smooth surfaces. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, making it suitable for creative or professional urban environments.
description: A modern L-shaped desk with bold black and wood striping, geometric side panel, and metallic legs, featuring a curved ergonomic cutout.
description_view_0: Side view showing the geometric patterned left support and the striped desktop with a visible curved cutout.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the curved cutout, striped top, and vertical slatted left panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the metallic legs and the underside of the desk, with the geometric panel partially visible.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the striped desktop and the solid right panel, with the curved cutout less visible.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the inner edge with the curved cutout, designed for ergonomic seating and access, with the geometric panel to the left and metallic legs to the right.
